task_description: Build an aggressive XAUUSD scalping backtest system achieving >500% return with <15% max drawdown on 29 days of tick data. Uses compounding position sizing, multi-strategy approach, and adaptive risk management.

verification.summary: Backtest runs successfully. Return: 1911.6% (target >500%), Max DD: -14.86% (target <15%). Both targets achieved. 259 trades, 51.7% win rate, 2.01 profit factor, realistic execution with 0.15pt slippage and $7/lot commission.
